nlmixr2libingest 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Ingesting four decades of population-PK literature: challenges and a token-efficient, quality-preserving pipeline

Package index

All functions

archetype_taxonomy()
Summarise the empirical archetype taxonomy
archetype_template()
Generate a starting template for an archetype
assign_archetype()
Assign a structural archetype label to each model
budget_advisor()
Soft budget advisor (never a hard kill)
build_feature_table()
Build the structural feature table for the nlmixr2lib model library
build_model_store()
Build a similarity store from the nlmixr2lib model library
build_register_index()
Build (or rebuild) the canonical-name register index
build_store()
Build a similarity store from a labelled corpus
classify()
Classify a paper from its text against a labelled store
classify_fittable_keyword()
Heuristic fittable score from popPK vocabulary (no store / no LLM)
cluster_features()
Data-driven archetype view: cluster models on a Gower distance
complexity_tier()
Complexity tier for a model from its structural features
distill_paper()
Distill a structured extraction sheet from a paper (LLM-optional)
embed_text()
Embed text with the local embedding model
embeddings_available()
Is a local embedding backend available?
evaluate_archetype_cv()
Leave-one-out archetype accuracy of a store (k-NN cross-validation)
filter_check_log()
Filter an R CMD check / devtools::check log to the parts that matter
filter_render_log()
Filter an rmarkdown / knitr render log to the failure and its context
lint_vignette()
Statically pre-lint a validation vignette for common render-killers
lookup_canonical()
Look up canonical names in the nlmixr2lib registers
model_features()
Structural features for a single nlmixr2lib model
naming_prebrief()
Build a model-specific naming pre-brief from a paper
nearest()
Nearest neighbours of a query string in a store
parse_registers()
Parse the nlmixr2lib canonical-name registers into a tidy data frame
register_db_path()
Default on-disk location of the cached register index (a DuckDB file)
registers_dir()
Locate the nlmixr2lib canonical-name register directory
render_lookup()
Render lookup results as compact markdown (for CLI / agent consumption)
render_prebrief()
Render a naming pre-brief as compact markdown
run_token_stats()
Token / cost analytics over the runner's RunRecords
save_store() load_store()
Save / load a similarity store
sidecar_match()
Decide, per question, whether a sidecar request is auto-answerable
sidecar_policy()
Load the sidecar auto-answer policy table
sidecar_respond()
Auto-answer a sidecar request when policy permits
source_trace()
Programmatic source-trace pre-check for a model against its paper
tier_budget()
Token budget for a complexity tier
validate_model()
Validate a model (and optionally its vignette) into one terse result

Developed by William Denney.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
